display_text: Blood Grenade, Cost: 50: Throw a grenade dealing 50 impact damage and applying a slow over time. Enemies in a 300 radius take 50 damage initially, then are slowed by 15% and take 15 damage every second for 5 seconds. Excellent for securing kills or deterring chases in the early game. Stats: CD: 10s, Radius: 300, Speed: 1100, Duration: 5s, Impact Damage: 50, DOT: 15 per second.
search_text: grenade item, throwable damage, slow over time, early game kill secure, harassment tool, chasing tool, zoning consumable, damage over time, AOE slow, DoT item, Blood Grenade

display_text: Blood Grenade, Cost: 50: Highly effective consumable for early game aggression. Provides burst damage and a slow to secure kills on low-health targets or finish off fleeing enemies. Its low cost and cooldown make it spammable for lane dominance and pressure.
search_text: early game aggression, kill secure consumable, lane dominance, spammable grenade, harass tool, pressure consumable, low cost damage, early kill potential, Blood Grenade

display_text: Blood Grenade, Cost: 50: Ideal for ganking or slowing down fast heroes. Use it to initiate a gank to slow the target, or throw it at retreating enemies to secure the kill. Also effective for zoning enemies away from objectives or last hits.
search_text: ganking tool, chase slow, secure kills, retreating enemies, zoning tool, slow gank initiation, objective control, area denial, Blood Grenade
